message:
🐛 Fix WebSocket CORS preflight for Private Network Access (#872)

The /ws endpoint was returning 400 Bad Request on OPTIONS preflight
requests because the gorilla/websocket upgrader rejects non-upgrade
requests. Chrome 104+ requires a successful Private Network Access
preflight (with Access-Control-Allow-Private-Network: true) before
allowing connections from HTTPS pages to localhost/127.0.0.1.

Add explicit OPTIONS handling to the WebSocket handler to return
proper CORS + PNA headers before the upgrade attempt.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
